mood.label: CAUTIOUSLY-RISK-OFF
mood.summary: Surging oil prices due to escalating US-Iran tensions are the primary driver, creating a risk-off sentiment despite a tech rebound in Asia. All eyes are on big tech earnings after the bell to justify high valuations.

indicesNarrative: US futures are pointing lower, with tech showing relative weakness as investors take risk off the table ahead of key earnings from Tesla and Alphabet. Surging crude oil prices, up over 4% due to heightened Middle East tensions, are fueling inflation concerns and weighing on sentiment. The VIX is up over 3%, and the 10-year yield is holding firm at 4.65%, reflecting the cautious mood.
technicalsNarrative: Technical data was not available at the time of generation.

sectorsThemes.name: Technology
sectorsThemes.note: Led the market higher in the previous session on a semiconductor rebound.

sectorsThemes.name: Energy
sectorsThemes.note: Gained on elevated oil prices amid geopolitical uncertainty.

sectorsThemes.name: Consumer Staples
sectorsThemes.note: Lagged the broader market, indicating a rotation away from defensive names.

sectorsNarrative: Yesterday saw a strong rebound in the Technology sector, particularly semiconductors, as dip buyers emerged. Energy also performed well due to rising crude prices. However, money flowed out of more defensive areas like Consumer Staples.
industryNarrative: Semiconductors were the clear leaders in the previous session, with the SOX index gaining over 5% as investors bought the recent dip in AI-related names. Conversely, data-centric and defensive software names struggled, suggesting a rebalancing from high-multiple software into hardware.

movers.why: Raised Q4 gross margin outlook and reported record backlog and order growth.
movers.traderLens: Qullamaggie - Episodic pivot on exceptional fundamental news.

movers.why: Strong Q2 earnings beat and raised full-year guidance.
Gained in sympathy with Super Micro's positive business update for the AI infrastructure sector.

Earnings after the bell. Key test for AI monetization and cloud growth.

traderLens.name: Minervini
traderLens.view: Market is under pressure from macro headwinds (oil, yields). Prudent to be defensive and wait for low-risk setups to emerge after earnings volatility.

traderLens.name: Ted Zhang
traderLens.view: Rotation out of software and into semiconductor hardware was evident. Energy is a key theme to watch given the geopolitical catalyst.

traderLens.name: Clement Ang
traderLens.view: A choppy, headline-driven market. Not an environment for A-grade setups. Best to sit on hands until the picture clears up post-megacap earnings.

traderLens.name: SRxTrades
traderLens.view: Volatility is elevated. Chasing gaps like SMCI is dangerous. Wait for price to settle and form clean pivots with volume confirmation.

traderLens.name: Jeff
traderLens.view: Stick to the plan. With futures indicating a weak open, respect stops and don't add to losing positions. Earnings season is a time for risk management, not heroics.

traderLens.name: Qullamaggie
traderLens.view: SMCI has an episodic pivot, but the entry is extended pre-market. The broader market lacks breakout momentum. Be patient.

traderLens.name: Composite
traderLens.view: Wait and observe. The surge in oil is a significant macro overhang. Let the market react to earnings from GOOGL and TSLA tonight before committing capital. The risk of a broader market pullback is elevated.

alert: Crude Oil surges over 4% on escalating US-Iran conflict, pressuring markets.

news.headline: Crude Oil surges over 4% to $88 as US-Iran military conflict escalates, threatening key shipping corridors.
U.S. stock futures fall as oil spike and pre-earnings caution weigh on sentiment.
Asian markets rise, led by a rebound in technology and semiconductor stocks.
Super Micro Computer (SMCI) surges 15% pre-market after raising Q4 margin guidance and reporting a record order backlog.
AT&T (T) beats Q2 earnings expectations, stock rises over 4% pre-market.
Tesla (TSLA) and Alphabet (GOOGL) set to report earnings after the close, providing a key test for the AI-driven rally.
